job_summary: Job description  Career Launch Program (Womens Career Pathway Initiative) WFH     About the Program:  Our Career Launch Program is a structured 6-month initiative designed to empower women who are ready to begin their career, return to the workforce after a break, or transition into a new profession...
responsibilities: Our Career Launch Program is a structured 6-month initiative designed to empower women who are ready to begin their career, return to the workforce after a break, or transition into a new professional field. The program provides hands-on experience, guided training, and personalised mentorship in a supportive and inclusive environment.
All participants receive a monthly stipend of INR 15,000 during the program.
Upon successful completion, candidates will be offered a permanent role with a monthly salary of INR 20,000, along with an annual salary increment of 20%.
Data Coordinator
Web Developer
Accounting Assistant
Python Full-Stack Developer
Health Recruiter
Marketing and Lead Generator
Graphic Designer and Content Creator
Starting their career for the first time
Returning to work after a career break
Exploring a new career path
Seeking structured training and real-world experience
Motivated to grow professionally in a supportive environment
6 months of structured training + practical experience
Monthly stipend of INR 15,000
Opportunity to secure a permanent role with INR 20,000 monthly salary
Annual 20% salary increment after joining as permanent staff
Direct mentorship and continuous performance feedback
Development of industry-relevant skills across your chosen role
Supportive work culture focused on empowering women
Graduate or above (students are NOT eligible) Minimum CGPA of 6.0
Must follow our application process as explained below (applications will be rejected if not followed)
Knowledge or experience in the role you are applying for
Strong communication skills (both written and verbal)
Strong Attention to detail, Creative thinking and data-driven decision-making
Work 8 hours per day (Work From Home), Monday to Saturday, starting from 6:00 AM
Own laptop or PC with a high-speed internet connection
Able to Join within 2 weeks
Able to Work independently with minimal supervision
Experience in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint
Must be a team player, professional, and a self-learner
First 6 Months - INR 15,000 per month
After 6 Months - INR 20,000 per month
Every Year Guaranteed Salary increase of 20%

We would love to get to know you beyond your resume. As part of the Career Launch Program, please submit a Personal Pitch in any format you preferthis could be a short video, audio message, PowerPoint with narration, or a simple Word/PDF document.

Use your Personal Pitch to share who you are, why you're interested in this program, and what motivates you to start or restart your career. Show us your confidence, creativity, and willingness to learn. Highlight the strengths, experiences, or qualities that make you a strong fit for the role you are applying for.
Be authentic, engaging, and clearwe want to understand your passion, your potential, and how this program can support your career goals.
Submit the above details in one email to jobs@gokulinfocare.com
Email Subject Career Launch Program - (position you are applying for)
Maintain professional email etiquette at all times
Naukri submissions alone are not accepted only email submissions with all required details will be considered.
Avoid AI-generated responses they will lead to disqualification.
Shortlisted candidates must complete Task 1 and Task 2, followed by Zoom interviews with HR and the Project Manager. Detailed instructions will be shared if your personal pitch is shortlisted
Apply only if you meet all mandatory requirements and accept these terms.

Availability: Must be available for weekly technical syncs (Virtual or in Kakkanad).

Database Optimization: Ensure client databases are secure, backed up, and optimized for performance.
Technical Troubleshooting: Assist the Digital Marketing team with technical issues related to tracking pixels, server-side tagging, and landing page performance.
Project-Based Freedom: You get paid for what you build. No "9-to-5" desk-warming.
AI Exposure: Work on projects that involve LLMs and Generative AI integrations.
Direct Payouts: Clear, transparent project fees get your share as soon as the client pays the invoice.
Growth Hub: Be part of a tech-forward agency in the heart of Kakkanad.
0.5 - 2 Years Experience (Self-taught geniuses with a strong GitHub portfolio are welcome).
Portfolio: Link to at least 2 live Django projects or public GitHub repositories.
Problem-Solver: A mindset that looks for "how to automate this" rather than just "how to code this."
Availability: Must be available for weekly technical syncs (Virtual or in Kakkanad).

Work with Databases: Integrate and manage databases such as PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or MySQL to ensure efficient data storage, retrieval, and security.
Write Scalable and Reusable Code: Ensure that the code you write is clean, efficient, reusable, and scalable, with a focus on long-term maintainability.

Collaborate on Projects: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including data scientists, designers, and project managers, to ensure smooth development and deployment of AI/ML and web applications.

Optimize Performance: Continuously optimize the performance of applications, focusing on speed, reliability, and scalability across various platforms and environments.

responsibilities: Data Pipeline Assistance: Help with data collection, cleaning, preprocessing, and feature engineering using libraries like Pandas and NumPy .
Model Implementation: Write, test, and maintain clean and efficient Python code for implementing and experimenting with various machine learning models (e.g., regression, classification, clustering).
Code Development: Contribute to the development of production-ready code, focusing on code quality, modularity, and adherence to company standards.
Experimentation: Run and document model training experiments, analyze results, and generate performance metrics.
Tooling: Utilize version control systems, primarily Git , to manage code repositories and collaborate effectively.

Learning & Research: Proactively learn new algorithms, tools, and best practices in the AI/ML space to support team objectives.
Required Qualifications & Skills
Education
Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a closely related quantitative field.
Technical Skills (Must-Have)
Programming: Strong proficiency in Python and familiarity with Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts.
ML Fundamentals: Solid understanding of core Machine Learning concepts and algorithms (e.g., Linear/Logistic Regression, Decision Trees, K-Means).
Libraries: Hands-on experience with fundamental Python libraries: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, scikit-learn.
Version Control: Experience using Git and GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket.
Mathematics: Foundational knowledge of Statistics, Linear Algebra, and Calculus relevant to machine learning.

Familiarity with deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch.
Basic understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and related services.
Experience with query languages like SQL.
Completed personal projects or successful participation in hackathons/Kaggle competitions demonstrating practical ML application.
